name: Orchestra Chat Watch
description: Syncs ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini tab state to Orchestra for browser chat watching.

content_scripts.comment: Deep-research frame observer (v0.5.7). ChatGPT renders the deep-research progress card in a CROSS-ORIGIN sandboxed iframe (connector_openai_deep_research.web-sandbox.oaiusercontent.com) that the parent-page content script cannot see into — the Stop-research button lives there. This script runs INSIDE such frames (all_frames) and relays ONLY that button's visibility (a boolean, structural — never content) to background.js over a port. Frames that never show the button (canvas/textdocs sandboxes) stay completely silent — the port connects lazily on first sighting.
